title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Zoro, Unknown person #12, Luffy as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you call our big bro a weak-ling, you bastard!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just you wait, I'll teach you a lesson or two about our big bro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Stop it!! Don't interfere, yosaku!! Johnny!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world's strongest swordsman.. that's got a great ring to it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...If the pirate king's com- ride isn't at least of that Calibre!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you trying to get stabbed in the heart?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Why do you refuse to step back?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IF I WERE TO TAKE A SINGLE STOP BACK TODAY, I WOULD LOSE SOMETHING VERY IM FORTANT.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A promise, an oath, or whatever it is... will be broken...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AND I WOULD BE UNABLE TO RETURN TO THIS PRECPICE THAT IM STANDING AT RIGHT NOW.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: THAT'S WHY I CAN'T STOP BACK

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He would rather die than live with re- grets?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "It's been a long time since I've seen some- one strong like you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And to show you my respect as a swords- man...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will sink you with this black blade, the strongest blade in the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This will be the final blow... I'll die if I miss...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the sword that cut our ships in half!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's EITH THE WORLD STRONGES FOR THE

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That's enough, big bro!! Please stop!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: three- sword style ultimate technique in

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 41 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
